options.name: -d
options.description: User specified values are in database units, in integer. Default: All values are in user units, in microns. (bool, optional) {<obj>|<objList>|head|top|selected}[.<objType>]...{.<attrName>} DB object-hierarchy-string. {<obj>|<objList>|head|top|selected}: Specifies the starting point for the query; <objType>: Specifies the object type; <attrName>: Specifies the object attribute to change.
